title: Judicial sales made by sheriff
doc_html:
§4350.  Judicial sales made by sheriff

All judicial sales made in pursuance of any order, judgment or decree of any court of this state, (except that of justices of the peace), shall be made by the sheriff of the parish where such sale is made unless otherwise provided.
doc_text:
§4350.  Judicial sales made by sheriff
All judicial sales made in pursuance of any order, judgment or decree of any court of this state, (except that of justices of the peace), shall be made by the sheriff of the parish where such sale is made unless otherwise provided.
